subcodes.first_line: O Beloved of My Heart! Although at the beginning of every utterance, every book, and every scroll there must needs be mention of God, exalted be His glory [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا محبوب فوادی اگرچه اول هر کلام و هر کتاب و هر دفتر باید بذکر حق جل جلاله
subcodes.subjects: @business; financial; property matters, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @praise and encouragement, @humility; meekness; lowliness
